_note: User added the LINE Official Account as a friend, or unblocked it. 'follow.isUnblocked: false' means a new follow (first-time or re-follow after unfollowing). 'follow.isUnblocked: true' means the user had previously blocked the account and is now unblocking it. Has a replyToken — use it to send a welcome/onboarding message. Only fires in 1-on-1 chat context; does not fire in groups or rooms.
